opinion.h: McLEOD v. OHIO. ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF CERTIORARI TO THE SUPREME COURT OF OHIO. No. 1117, Misc. Decided May 24, 1965.
opinion.p: James V. Barbuto and John D. Smith for respondent.
The motion for leave to proceed in forma pauperis and the petition for writ of certiorari are granted. The judgment is reversed. Massiah v. United States, 377 U.S. 201.
